---
title: "Coding workflow"
---

This section covers the core workflow in ACE: import sources, build a codebook, code passages, and keep source-level notes.

## Pages in this section

- [Import sources](user-guide/import.qmd)
- [Code text](user-guide/coding.qmd)
- [Codebooks](user-guide/codebooks.qmd)
- [Source notes](user-guide/notes.qmd)

## Suggested order

Start with import, then create a small codebook before coding the full dataset. Add source notes when observations apply to a whole source rather than to one selected passage.
